tasks.subject: Task 1: Add strip_leading_zeros_wsid config to DetectionManager
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `strip_leading_zeros_wsid` boolean to DetectionManager with getter/setter and config persistence.

**Files:**
- Modify: `gk_install_builder/detection.py`
- Modify: `tests/unit/test_detection.py`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["gk_install_builder/detection.py", "tests/unit/test_detection.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/unit/test_detection.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["strip_leading_zeros_wsid defaults to False", "getter/setter methods exist", "set_config loads the setting", "backward compatible with missing key"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Inject WSID stripping into generated scripts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generator conditionally injects integer conversion line into PowerShell and Bash scripts.

**Files:**
- Modify: `gk_install_builder/templates/GKInstall.ps1.template`
- Modify: `gk_install_builder/templates/GKInstall.sh.template`
- Modify: `gk_install_builder/generators/gk_install_generator.py`
- Modify: `tests/unit/test_generator_integration.py`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["gk_install_builder/templates/GKInstall.ps1.template", "gk_install_builder/templates/GKInstall.sh.template", "gk_install_builder/generators/gk_install_generator.py", "tests/unit/test_generator_integration.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/unit/test_generator_integration.py -v -k strip_leading_zeros", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PS1 contains stripping when enabled", "Bash contains stripping when enabled", "no stripping when disabled", "correct position in script"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add UI checkbox and test preview in Detection Settings
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add checkbox with tooltip and arrow preview notation in Detection Settings dialog.

**Files:**
- Modify: `gk_install_builder/dialogs/detection_settings.py`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["gk_install_builder/dialogs/detection_settings.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["checkbox appears in UI", "tooltip present", "state persisted", "arrow preview when enabled", "no arrow when disabled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Full integration verification and cleanup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify end-to-end that all pieces work together.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/ -v --tb=short", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all tests pass", "end-to-end generation works", "config persistence works"]}
```
